rect.style: stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px; fill: white; fill-opacity: 0.95; stroke-dasharray: 0, 5;

circle.style: stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 2px; fill: white; fill-opacity: 0.95;

path.style: fill: white; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke: rgb(34, 36, 42); stroke-width: 1px;
